programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: The helicopter crews from Air Station Kodiak face one rescue after another, but the weather threatens the operations.

programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: Follows the men and women of the US Coast guard at Air Station Kodiak  where they perform rescues  protect the environment  and oversee marine transportation safety.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: A grandmother loses her cool after a suspect package is found in her laptop  officers in Birmingham stub out a couple's plan to make a quick buck  high traces of cocaine are found in Gatwick.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: A full body scan at Gatwick Airport reveals one man's suspicious excuses are difficult to believe  on a flight from Spain, a couple bring back more than a sun tan  a quick fire questioning proves to be the downfall of a hapless smuggler.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: At Gatwick, officers get a tip-off and are on the lookout for a passenger previously charged with importing drugs by surgically stitching them into a live Labrador.

programs.title: Customs
programs.desc: Customs officers board a suspicious yacht off Cornwall and receive an angry welcome  in Dover, officers searching under a truck find an illegal immigrant hiding on top of the engine.
